response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Their C++ experience is limited to one early-career role (NI LabWindows/CVI components) rather than the required 5–10 years of recent, hands-on Windows C++ development. Their database background is MongoDB/MySQL with no stated SQL Server or Oracle experience, and they show no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure — the brief fintech-adjacent role in Germany used a Node/TypeScript stack. The bulk of their career centers on web, D-language, and full-stack JavaScript work, which this position does not call for.
strengths: Genuine systems-level experience: C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI and low-latency async services in DLang
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community teaching/mentoring
Broad polyglot background with proven ability to pick up new stacks and domains quickly
concerns: C++ experience is dated and limited to a single early role, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years
No Fixed Income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain exposure
Solid general engineering fundamentals and low-latency systems work
